Spray-On Bedliner Depot

Spray Like a Pro

Pick a truck color, spray on the bedliner, and see how it looks. The faster you finish, the higher your payout.

  1. 1
    Pick your truck color
    Tap the color panel and choose a shade.
  2. 2
    Spray the bed
    Drag across the truck bed to lay down the liner.
  3. 3
    Reveal your finish
    Hit 100% coverage, then peel the tape to see the result.
